alkylation reagent: alkylated with 15 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min in the dark
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 15 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min in the dark
enrichment method: Phosphorylated peptides were enriched by High-Select Fe-NTA phosphopeptide enrichment kit
fractionation method: fractionated using a high-pH reverse-phase HPLC system
fragmentation method: using higher energy collisional dissociation coupled to a Proxeon EASY-nLc II nano-HPLC
instrument: analyzed via the Q Exactive plus hybrid quadrupole-orbitrap mass spectrometer
labeling: we used TMT labelling and quantitative proteomics
reduction concentration: reduced with 100 mM DTT at 56 °C for 30 min
